app.name: Chapterly
app.one_sentence_promise: A personal reading journal that turns solitary reading into shared discussion with the two or three people who actually finish books with you.
app.target_user: Adults who read regularly and want deeper engagement than a library app, without a public Goodreads-style feed.
app.painful_moment: Finishing a book with a strong reaction and having nowhere specific to put it — group chats bury book talk, public feeds feel performative.
app.why_different: Solo-first private journal and quote capture with page-synced private circles of 2-6 people invited via Contacts/Messages, not a public algorithmic feed.
app.why_users_pay: Unlimited circles/books, OCR quote capture from physical pages, yearly reading wrap-up exports, on-device discussion prompts.
app.subscription_model: Free: 1 circle, manual quotes. Paid monthly/annual: unlimited circles, OCR capture, advanced stats/export.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: On-device journal and circle data; circle exchange for v1 happens via Messages/share-sheet delivery of entries, no server.
app.future_backend_roadmap: CloudKit/private server sync for real-time circle discussion threads.
ios_native_features: App Intents/Siri for logging a quote
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: On-device Vision OCR for photographed quotes; optional on-device LLM to generate discussion questions from a synopsis.
app.design_direction: Warm, literary, editorial — serif headlines, paper textures, generous whitespace; feels like a nice notebook, not a feed.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a warm, editorial reading-journal app: a paper-textured home timeline of books and quotes, a distraction-free quote-capture camera view with OCR crop confirmation, and a small private circle view that reads like shared marginalia rather than a chat app.
app.app_store_positioning: The private, beautiful way to talk about the books you actually finish — not another public feed.
key_risks: Circles need a second person to show full value; solo users may never invite anyone
On-device OCR accuracy on varied print/lighting
Competing with generic notes apps for the same journaling habit
app.invalidation_criteria: If solo retention alone doesn't hold at 4 weeks and few users ever invite a second person, rethink circles as an optional export rather than a core loop.
app.v1_build_scope: Personal reading log, manual+OCR quote capture, one circle via Messages share, personal stats.
